name: approach
description: Marketplace for the `approach` plugin — frames any task into one of 11 named execution approaches (Pipeline, Swarm, Critic, Gated, Contract, Loop, One-shot, Event, Dialogue, Search, Blackboard), composed by the Composer meta-skill, for the orchestrator to execute. See plugin ARCHITECTURE.md for the problem→frame→approach→solution model.

plugins.name: approach
plugins.description: Approach-space framers. Each skill takes a framed problem and produces an explicit approach contract — stages, workers, termination, failure handling — for the orchestrator to execute.
